{{Quote|Your host: the wisest of the wise, Ten-Abu Doba!|A podracing announcer|<ref name="Star Wars Episode I: Racer">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]</ref>}}
'''Ten-Abu Donba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Talid/Legends|Talid]] from [[Ando Prime/Legends|Ando Prime]] who served as a [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] of the [[Order of Dai Bendu]].

==Biography==
[[File:TenAbuDonba-E1R.jpg|thumb|left]]
Ten-Abu Donba was known as one of the wisest Andobi [[Order of Dai Bendu|Bendu monks]] on [[Ando Prime/Legends|Ando Prime]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. He also hosted [[Podracing/Legends|podraces]] and other notable events.

{{Char-stub}}
